title: L.O.L. Surprise Supermarket
description: Surprise LOL dolls - fun supermarket for kids! Surprise! There's a new shop in town L.O.L. Surprise Dolls! Today fashion dolls is getting ready to go to the supermarket. Fansy and her girlfriend Diva owners of store. Help all the dolls do their work! Babes are very funny and cute! Surprise LOL dolls will be your friend in this fun game! Are you ready for cute adventure? Let's start! Go shopping in the grocery shop along with your favorite dolls! So many items to interact with and touch with endless possibilities in role play!
